title: Merge develop and run 3-cycle procedure association verification

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting: commit current feature branch worktree, merge latest develop, run a fresh procedure smoke test (scorecard 1229, days=90, max_samples=100, max_iterations=3) to verify evaluation<->scoreVersion and procedure<->evaluation associations in task/procedure views.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing auth normalization now: removing API-key auth overrides from ProcedureTask conversation viewer and updating tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented auth normalization in conversation viewer: removed explicit apiKey auth overrides from chat session/message list/create/get/subscriptions and startConsoleRun/getTask GraphQL calls. Updated conversation viewer tests and verified: 2 conversation-viewer suites + ProcedureTask optimizer auth suite all pass.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User approved landing changes. Committing auth fix, merging feature branch into develop, pushing, and iterating on CI failures until green.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Addressing CI lint failure on develop: fix undefined procedure_info reference in plexus/cli/procedure/service.py, rerun lint/tests, push, and verify GitHub Actions green.
